'''nazuthu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nystose|nystose]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-z-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nystose|nystose]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| nazuthu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || næzithith || næzithij || næzithish || næzithi
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || nazuzuthuth || nazuzuthuj || nazuzuthush || nazuzuthu
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || nazuthuth || nazuthuj || nazuthush || nazuthu
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || nazufthufth || nazufthufj || nazufthufsh || nazufthuf
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || nazuthuthu || nazuthuju || nazuthushu || nazuthuku
|-
| [[Patient]] || nazuthuth || nazuthuj || nazuthush || nazuthu
|-
| [[Possessive]] || nazuthuthul || nazuthujul || nazuthushul || nazuthukul
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || nazuthuuthuthu || nazuthuujuju || nazuthuushushu || nazuthuuku
|-
| [[Dative]] || nazuthuthun || nazuthujun || nazuthushun || nazuthukun
|-
| [[Speaker]] || nazuthuthuoro || nazuthujuoro || nazuthushuoro || nazuthukuoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
